prompt: Create a photorealistic 16:9 daytime street scene in a fictional Japanese entertainment district inspired by Akihabara or Shinjuku, with a large advertising truck centered in the composition driving down a multi-lane road. The truck should be a glossy white modern box truck viewed from a front three-quarter angle, chrome grille and mirrors sparkling, realistic windshield reflections, visible headlights, license plate, tires, and road markings. The entire side and roof billboard of the truck advertise a newly released fantasy RPG called ECLIPSE SAGA, featuring an elegant blonde anime holy knight woman in white and gold armor with a radiant sun emblem. Include large Japanese ad copy on the truck side reading 光の意志が、世界を救う。, smaller launch text reading 新作RPG、開幕。, and the game title in refined serif lettering. Surround the road with tall commercial buildings packed with colorful vertical signs, anime billboards, game posters, storefront banners, glass façades, and LED screens; repeat the same fantasy character on several building ads in the background. Show a crowd of pedestrians on both sidewalks and in the foreground, with exactly 4 clearly visible people holding smartphones up to photograph or record the advertising truck: two blurred phones in the lower left foreground, one raised phone at lower center, and one raised phone at right foreground. Make the ad truck the sharp focal point while foreground spectators are slightly blurred for depth of field. Lighting is bright midday sun with blue sky, crisp shadows, vibrant but realistic colors, urban bustle, cinematic street photography, high detail, no real brands, no watermark, no extra vehicles blocking the truck.
